_comment: Monitoring-profile catalog. Each profile expresses *what to monitor* in a room: which sensor types are required vs recommended, plus a typical density hint (sensors per N m² where applicable). The room-state engine, the device suggester, and the coverage annotation in GET /config all read this catalog. Sensor type ids must match simulator/devices catalog ids.

monitoring_profiles.name: Basic Environmental
monitoring_profiles.description: Minimal coverage for low-occupancy spaces: temperature/humidity tracking only.
monitoring_profiles.notes: Suitable for corridors, storage, hotel corridors. Keeps cost low while still trending baseline conditions.

monitoring_profiles.name: IAQ — Standard
monitoring_profiles.description: Standard indoor-air-quality coverage: CO2 + temperature/humidity + TVOC + PM in occupied spaces.
monitoring_profiles.notes: Default for most occupied office, retail and education spaces.

monitoring_profiles.name: IAQ + Occupancy
monitoring_profiles.description: IAQ paired with people-counting so CO2 rises can be attributed to occupancy spikes.
monitoring_profiles.notes: Required for meeting rooms, classrooms, and any space where occupancy explains IAQ variation.

monitoring_profiles.name: HVAC Operational
monitoring_profiles.description: HVAC virtual points (supply/return temp, fan state, setpoint) for operational monitoring and fault detection.
monitoring_profiles.notes: Typically one HVAC point per AHU/FCU zone. Pair with IAQ to correlate complaints with HVAC state.

monitoring_profiles.name: Energy — Basic
monitoring_profiles.description: Single energy meter for the space — total kWh + active power.
monitoring_profiles.notes: Sub-metered floors, cold rooms, server rooms.

monitoring_profiles.name: Energy — Advanced
monitoring_profiles.description: Detailed energy sub-metering paired with HVAC and IAQ for kWh-per-CO2-ppm style analytics.
monitoring_profiles.notes: Data centers, large mechanical rooms, hospital plant rooms.

monitoring_profiles.name: Guest Room — Advanced
monitoring_profiles.description: Hotel guest-room bundle: IAQ + occupancy + HVAC operational point for comfort + energy.
monitoring_profiles.notes: One sensor per guest room. Drives HVAC setbacks when unoccupied.

monitoring_profiles.name: Mall / People Flow
monitoring_profiles.description: People-counting first, IAQ second — used for retail footfall, mall entrances and food courts.
monitoring_profiles.notes: Pair with IAQ on lobbies / food courts to explain CO2 and PM excursions.

monitoring_profiles.name: Research / Lab — Advanced
monitoring_profiles.description: Lab-grade coverage: IAQ + HVAC operational point (fume hood / exhaust state) + energy.
monitoring_profiles.notes: Surfaces VOC events and ventilation failures simultaneously.
